title: AI Blog
excerpt: A modern retro-style static blog system built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and MDX. Designed for developers and content creators who appreciate clean design and powerful features.
content:
Project Overview

AI Blog is a modern retro-style static blog system built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and MDX. Designed for developers and content creators who appreciate clean design and powerful features.

Features

- Static Site Generation (SSG) - Fast loading with pre-rendered HTML - MDX Support - Write rich content with Markdown + React components - Internationalization (i18n) - Built-in support for English and Chinese - Neo-Brutalism Design - Modern retro aesthetic with hard borders and solid shadows - Dark Mode - Seamless light/dark theme switching - Responsive Design - Works perfectly on all devices - Free Hosting - Deploy to GitHub Pages or Vercel at zero cost

Tech Stack

- Framework: Next.js 16 with App Router - UI: React 19 + Tailwind CSS 4 - Content: MDX via `next-mdx-remote` - Frontmatter: `gray-matter` for YAML parsing - Theming: `next-themes` for dark mode

Designed for developers and content creators who appreciate clean design and powerful features. ## Features - **Static Site Generation (SSG)** - Fast loading with pre-rendered HTML - **MDX Support** - Write rich content with Markdown + React components - **Internationalization (i18n) - Built-in support for English and Chinese - **Neo-Brutalism Design** - Modern retro aesthetic with hard borders and solid shadows - **Dark Mode** - Seamless light/dark theme switching - **Responsive Design** - Works perfectly on all devices - **Free Hosting** - Deploy to GitHub Pages or Vercel at zero cost ## Tech Stack - **Framework**: Next.js 16 with App Router - **UI**: React 19 + Tailwind CSS 4 - **Content**: MDX via `next-mdx-remote` - **Frontmatter**: `gray-matter` for YAML parsing - **Theming**: `next-themes` for dark mode
